summary: End-to-end testing of MotifForge: 15/15 backend pytest assertions passed against live Ensembl/JASPAR/UCSC APIs (TP53 pipeline produced real promoter chr17, ensembl_id, GC=0.533, motif hits). Frontend: Landing, all 6 module routes, sidebar navigation, extraction trigger, sequence viewer, motif table, graph canvas, characterization (radar/hub-motifs/centrality), engineering (suggestions/before-after/diagnostics), and Export Center with working FASTA + PDF downloads all verified.

issues: data-testid 'cooccurrence-matrix' and 'triplet-list' are placed on inner elements that only render when there are >=1 pair / >=1 triplet. With TP53@threshold 0.85 / 15 matrices the extraction yields 2 motif hits and the empty-state messages render instead. Suggest moving the testids onto the outer panel containers so automated tests can still locate the regions when empty (functional behavior is correct).

action_items: (Optional) Move data-testid='cooccurrence-matrix' and 'triplet-list' from the inner conditional render to the outer PanelShell so they exist regardless of data volume.
critical_code_review_comments: All endpoints use async/await and offload sync BioPython/JASPAR/Ensembl/UCSC HTTP calls via asyncio.to_thread — correct pattern.
MongoDB cache layer (BioCache) uses 24h TTL and excludes _id (per find_one projections) — clean.
ExtractRequest validates via Pydantic; 400 for missing input, 503 for unavailable upstream data — proper status codes.
Interactive elements have data-testid attributes per /app/frontend/src/constants/tids.js.
server.py is 427 lines — under the 700-line guideline but consider splitting into routers per module if more endpoints are added.
seed_data_creation: None. Test extraction inserts one MongoDB doc per /extract call (production behavior). JASPAR PWM cache pre-populated from prior calls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend cache warms on first JASPAR/Ensembl call (24h TTL). Pytest run was fast because cache was already warm — first cold run would be 60-180s. All 6 module testids verified, but mining heatmap/triplet testids only appear when motif extraction yields >=2 hits with co-occurrence within window. Use higher matrix_limit (e.g. 30) and lower threshold (0.8) to force richer mining output if needed.
